title: AESEXL
description:
A vanilla plus texture pack containing original content as well as features from other vanilla plus texturepacks. 
Sodium and mods like CTM, CIT,CEM or Optifine recomended, but not necessary
body:
# AESEXL

This is a texturepack that aims to keep vanilla-ish feeling, but make it better, more interesting and with more variation! Some parts of this texturepack require OptiFine (or other mods that give you the same effects). Sadly some of those parts break when not using those mods. Im currently working on it. To make this pack i used many inspirations and textures from other texturepacks(you can see the full list of them in README in the texturepack). 

Please tell me what you think in the issues on [github](https://github.com/AndronixESE/AESEXL-)! If you notice any bugs, please report them. If you want me to add anything just ask and i'll try! I hope you'll like it and have a great time using it.

 

### Remember to install the latest version of the texturepack, because it still has a lot of bugs which im still working on fixing! 

 

### Also has dark mode!
